data.name: ChatHistoryTab_ChatHistoryTimer
data.value: Anzahl der Sekunden, um Nachrichten im Chatverlauf zu halten

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_ChatHistoryTimerHelpMarker
data.value: Setze dies auf 0, um die Funktion zu deaktivieren

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_EnableChatHistoryFilterHelpMarker
data.value: Wenn eine Nachricht innerhalb der letzten {0} Sekunden gesendet wurde, wird diese gefiltert.

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_IgnoreMessagesSentByPlayer
data.value: Ignoriere Nachrichten, die vom Spieler gesendet worden sind.

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_IgnoreMessagesSentByPlayerHelpMarker
data.value: Filtert wiederholte Nachrichten die vom Spieler gesendet wurde. Aktiviere dies, wenn du wiederholte Nachrichten die du gesendet hast, aus deiner Sichtweise herausfiltern möchtest.

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_LengthOfChatHistory
data.value: Anzahl der Nachrichten, die im Chatverlauf bleiben sollen

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_LengthOfChatHistoryWarningMessage
data.value: ACHTUNG: Eine überhöhte Chatverlauf-Länge kann die Spielleistung negativ beeinflussen. Es wird empfohlen, diese bei 50 oder niedriger zu halten.

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_SelectChannels
data.value: Folgende Channel sollen vom Chatverlauf gefiltert werden:

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatAddsMessages
data.value: Show adds calling for help messages

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatAddsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The goblin calls for help!

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatCastingMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The enemy begins casting Fire.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatEffectsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The enemy suffers the effect of Poison.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatEnemyReadyMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The enemy is ready to act!

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatEnmityMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The enemy's enmity toward you increases!

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatMissesMessages
data.value: Show combat miss and evade messages

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatMissesMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The enemy evades your attack.

data.name: ConfigWindow_SettingAlwaysOn
data.value: This message type is always shown and cannot be toggled.

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_HideGatheringAttemptsLocationMessages
data.value: Hide only locations that affect gathering attempts

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_HideGatheringBoonLocationMessages
data.value: Hide only locations that affect Gatherer's Boon

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_HideGatheringYieldLocationMessages
data.value: Hide only locations that affect gathering yield

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowAetherialReductionMinigameMessages
data.value: Show collectable reduction minigame messages (integrity, woodsman actions, etc.)

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowAetherialReductionMinigameMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Your meticulous actions prove effective. Integrity is not reduced.

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowAetherialReductionSuccessMessages
data.value: Show message when you successfully reduce a collectable item

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowCosmicDailyProgress
data.value: Show cosmic class points and daily progress

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowCosmicDailyProgressHelpMarker
data.value: Cosmic class points and daily progress lines.

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowCosmicExplorationMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Cosmic exploration progress and area messages.

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowCosmicRewards
data.value: Show cosmic currency and container obtains

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowCosmicRewardsHelpMarker
data.value: Cosmic currency, containers, and reward obtains.

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowCraftingSynthesisCompleteHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You synthesize a Linen Bandana. (English only; other languages need localization)

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowFishAddedToGuideMessages
data.value: Show message when a fish is added to the fish guide

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowFishingFlavorTextHelpMarker
data.value: Shows Fisher's Intuition messages ("the scent of baitfish...") and per-fish lure flavor text (loaded from game data at startup).

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowFishingHoleDiscovered
data.value: Show message when a fishing location is discovered

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowFishingHoleName
data.value: Show name of fishing hole when line is cast

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowGatheringSensesLabel
data.value: Show "You sense..." messages for gathering locations

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowLocationGatheringEffectMessages
data.value: Show message when location affects gathering yield, receiving Gatherer's Boon, or gathering attempts

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowLureMessages
data.value: Show Modest/Ambitious Lure and bite feeling messages

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowLureMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You attempt to lure small-jawed fish to your hook. / You have a feeling you've attracted a fish with a weak bite!

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowMateriaExtractedMessages
data.value: Show message when materia is extracted from spiritbonded gear

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowMateriaOvermeldFailuresMessages
data.value: Show message when materia fails to be overmelded onto gear

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowMateriaShattersMessages
data.value: Show message when materia shatters during retrieval

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowMateriaSuccesfullyAttachedMessages
data.value: Show message when materia is successfully attached to gear

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowMooching
data.value: Show message after recasting with a moochable fish

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowObtainedSandsFromAetherialReductionMessages
data.value: Show the number of obtained sands after using aetherial reduction

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowOtherPlayerCompletedSynthesisMessages
data.value: Show synthesis message when other players complete a craft.

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowStellarMissionMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Stellar mission area and related system messages.

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowSuccesfullyRetrievedMateriaMessages
data.value: Show message when you successfully retrieve materia from gear

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_ShowTrialSynthesisMessages
data.value: Show final status messages upon finishing a Trial synthesis

data.name: CraftingGatheringTab_StellarSectionFilteringNote
data.value: Stellar and cosmic system lines need Filter System channel on General. Stellar and cosmic gathering-channel lines need Filter Gathering channels on General.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketBoardMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Item sold (after fees), all listings sold, and sale gil entrusted to your retainer. Use Listing started and stopped below, or Improved market board lines on the General tab. Sold lines use the retainer-sale channel; other lines use System.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedMarketBoardSale
data.value: Improved market board & retainer sale lines

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedMarketBoardSaleHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Pair of titanium gold saberfangs sold for 757 gil. Replaces the long “put up for sale in … markets” line. Requires Show market board & retainer listings on the Economy tab (and Filter System / retainer-sale channels on General).

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketBoardSellingStatusHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You are now selling items in the Limsa Lominsa markets. / You are no longer selling items in the Limsa Lominsa markets.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowGilSpentMessageHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You spend gil on a purchase.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowGilWithdrawnMessageHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Your gil has been safely withdrawn.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowVendorPurchaseMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You purchase an item from a vendor.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowVendorSellMessages
data.value: Show Items sold to vendor or retainer

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowVendorSellMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You sell 3 Shisui gobies for 6 gil.

data.name: EmotesTab_FilterCustomEmoteChannelHelpMarker
data.value: This will hide all Custom Emotes unless it is an emote targeting you or an emote you used.

data.name: EmotesTab_FilterStandardEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: This will hide all emote text unless it is an emote targeting you or an emote you used.

data.name: EmotesTab_ShowOtherCustomEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: This will hide all "/em" messages unless it mentions you or is a custom emote you used. eg. Another Player leans over and gives you a big bear hug.

data.name: EmotesTab_ShowSelfCustomEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: When emote filtering is enabled, keep messages for emotes you use yourself. eg. You gently pat <user>

data.name: GeneralTab_BlockCountHelpMarker
data.value: Wird nur alle 100 blockierten Nachrichten, beim Gebietswechsel, oder beim Ausloggen aktualisiert.

data.name: GeneralTab_BlockedMessages
data.value: Tidy Chat hat bisher {0:n0} Nachrichten blockiert.

data.name: GeneralTab_CopySayMessage
data.value: Verbesserte /sagen Nachrichten automatisch in die Zwischenablage kopieren

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterCraftingSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Crafting channel messages are hidden unless a Show option on the Crafting/Gathering tab allows them. When disabled, Crafting is not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterCustomEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: Blockiert alle "/em" Nachrichten, die nicht von dir stammen oder dich erwähnen. z.B. Anderer Spieler lehnt sich zu dir rüber und knuddelt dich ganz doll.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: Blockiert alle Emotes, an denen du nicht beteiligt bist.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterGatheringSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Gathering and Gathering System messages are hidden unless a Show option on the Crafting/Gathering tab allows them. When disabled, those channels are not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterLootSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Loot Roll messages are hidden unless a Show option on the Obtain tab allows them (cast lot, your rolls, party rolls). Item obtained lines use the Obtained channel. When disabled, Loot Roll is not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterObtainedSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Obtained (loot notice) messages are hidden unless an Obtain tab option allows them. Show … = allow when checked; Hide … = hide when checked. When disabled, Obtained is not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterProfileHelpMarker
data.value: Resets filter toggles to built-in defaults for the selected profile. Any manual change switches to Custom. Settings save automatically when you close this window.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterProgressSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Progress and Battle System messages are hidden unless a Show option allows them (Progress tab: XP, level-ups, achievements; Crafting/Gathering: cosmic dataset submissions). Progress tab quest lines use the System channel—also enable Filter System channel. When disabled, Progress and Battle System are not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterSelfEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: Blockiert Nachrichten von deinen (persönlichen) Emotes. z.B. Du streichelst <user> sanft.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterSystemSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, System and Retainer Sale messages are hidden unless a Show option allows them (System, Economy, Party & Duty, Progress tab quest lines, Crafting/Gathering stellar/cosmic system lines, and similar). When disabled, those channels are not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedCommendationsDutyName
data.value: Füge den abgeschlossenen Inhalt der Nachricht zu "Wertvollster Spieler"-Ehrungen hinzu

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedDutyCommenceMessagingHelpMarker
data.value: Replaces duty entry spam with a single line: Duty Name has begun. Hides level sync, item level sync, alliance reform, and Echo briefing lines.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedInstanceMessagingHelpMarker
data.value: Ändert den Instanzentext zu: Du bist jetzt in Instanz: #

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedNoviceNetworkMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Reduziert die Textmenge beim Beitritt zum Neulings-Chat und vereinheitlicht die Nachricht beim Verlassen.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedPlayerCommendationsHelpMarker
data.value: Deaktiviert die Systemnachricht für erhaltene Ehrungen und ersetzt sie durch eine einzelne Nachricht in deinem Dalamud Chat-Kanal (siehe "Allgemein" Einstellungen in Dalamud - standardmäßig ist dies Debug)

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedSayMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Wenn du für einen Auftrag etwas /sagen musst wird die Nachricht so angepasst, dass sie leicht kopiert und eingefügt werden kann

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedTreasureDungeonMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: When kicked from a treasure dungeon, replaces the trap message with a concise message showing which floor you were kicked on.

data.name: GeneralTab_TidyChatTagHelpMarker
data.value: Stellt Nachrichten, die von Tidy Chat gesendet oder modifiziert wurden, [TidyChat] voran

data.name: NormalizeSpecialCharactersExceptInPartyOrAllianceChannels
data.value: Normalize special characters - except in Party or Alliance channels

data.name: ObtainTab_CastYourLotHelpMarker
data.value: Dies ist die Nachricht die angezeigt wird, wenn du um Beute würfelst. z.B. Du würfelst um <item>

data.name: ObtainTab_HideInventoryItemAddedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The archeo kingdom wristband of casting is added to your inventory. (LogMessage 789; often duplicates "You obtain …" on retainer ventures.)

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowAnotherPlayerCastsLotMessages
data.value: Show "Another Player casts his/her lot <item>" messages

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowAnotherPlayerCastsLotMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Diese Nachricht wird angezeigt, wenn ein anderer Spieler in der Gruppe um ein Beutegut würfelt. z.B. Ein Spieler würfelt um <item>.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowAnotherPlayerObtainsItemMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Dies zeigt Nachrichten an, wenn ein anderer Spieler in der Gruppe um die Beute erhält. z.B. Ein Spieler hat ein <item> erhalten!

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowBeastTribeCraftingMaterialsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Hides allied society crafting material obtain messages. eg. You obtain Starboard Hull Component Materials

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowBeastTribeCurrenciesMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Hides allied society currency obtain messages for all 18 allied societies (through Yok Huy in Dawntrail), including Pelu Pelplume, Mamool Ja Nanook, and Yok Huy Ward.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowCrackedClustersMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Dies wird inaktive Polykristalle wie dendritische, oder petaloide, Polykristalle anzeigen. Um elementare Polykristalle auszublenden, beachte die "Elementare Polykristalle ausblenden"-Funktion weiter unten. z.B. Du erhältst einen inaktiven dendritischen Polykristall

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowElementalShardsCrystalsClustersMessages
data.value: Hide elemental shards, crystals, and clusters

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowElementalShardsCrystalsClustersMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Dies wird die Nachricht anzeigen die erscheint, sobald du elementare Scherben, Kristalle oder Polykristalle erntest oder erhältst. z.B. Du erhältst 30 Eis-Scherben

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowGeneralItemObtainsHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for general item obtain lines on the LootNotice channel (excluding currency-specific filters below).

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowMathematicsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du erhältst 60 Allagische Steine der Mathematik.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowMnemonicsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du erhältst 20 Allagische Steine der Mnemonik.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowObtainedQuestItemsHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You obtain the mysterious artifact.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowOnlyPartyMemberRolls
data.value: Show only rolls from party members

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowOnlyPartyMemberRollsHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, hides loot roll messages from players outside your party (e.g. other alliance parties in a 24-man raid). Requires "Show Another Player rolls" to be enabled and only takes effect while in a party.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowOtherPlayersLootRollsHelpMarker
data.value: Shows when other players cast lot or roll on loot.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowPoeticsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du erhältst 100 Allagische Steine der Poesie.

data.name: ObtainTab_ShowYourLootRollsHelpMarker
data.value: Shows your "cast lot" and loot roll result messages. eg. You cast your lot for the <item>

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowAccursedHoardDiscoveredMessages
data.value: Show when Accursed Hoard is discovered

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowAccursedHoardNotSensedMessages
data.value: Show when Accursed Hoard is not sensed on the current floor

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowAccursedHoardSensedMessages
data.value: Show when Accursed Hoard is sensed

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowAirshipVoyageMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. A new exploratory voyage destination...has been discovered!

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowCairnOfPassageActivatedMessages
data.value: Show when the Cairn of Passage is activated

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowCairnOfPassageGlowsMessages
data.value: Show when the Cairn of Passage begins to glow

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowCairnOfReturnUsedMessages
data.value: Show when Cairn of Return is used

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowCompletedVentureHelpMarker
data.value: eg. RetainerName has completed a venture!

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowDutyFinderMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Duty registration complete. Participation requirements, unrestricted party notices. Mostly system channel; withdrawal notices use the error channel.

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowFloorNumberMessages
data.value: Show floor number when entering a new floor

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowNowALeaderHelpMarker
data.value: These messages occur when made the leader of a party, Free Company, PvP party, Linkshell, or Cross-world Linkshell.

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowObtainedPomanderMessages
data.value: Show when the party obtains a pomander

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowPartyObjectiveOnJoin
data.value: Show Party objective & comment on join

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowRetainerVentureMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You assign your retainer to Quick Exploration. You pay a retainer 2 ventures.

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowSealedOffMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The area has been sealed off! / The area is no longer sealed.

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowSubmarineVoyageMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. A new subaquatic voyage destination...has been discovered!

data.name: PartyDutyTab_ShowTrapTriggeredMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The landmine is triggered... / The luring trap is triggered... / The detonator is triggered!

data.name: ProgressTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Quest & achievements, duty bonuses, and most unlocks use the system channel (see each help). XP and PVP EXP use Filter Progress channel on General. Mount unlocks use the action channel.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowAdventurerInNeedAwardMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z. B. Für das Abschließen mit einer gefragten Rolle erhältst du einen Bonus von 7.200 Gil.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowBonusAwardForDutyRouletteMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z. B. Für das Abschließen einer täglichen Herausforderung erhälst du einen Bonus von 4.252.498 Routine und 12.000 Gil.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowEarnedAchievementMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You earn the achievement <name>! Uses the Progress channel.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowLearnedAbilityMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: When you learn an ability or minion. Most lines use the Progress channel; a few job quest lines use System.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowLevelUpMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Das hier zeigt dir die Nachricht die du erhältst, wenn du ein Level-Up hast. Es kann in diversen Instanzen wie Palast der Toten und Himmelsäule als nervig angesehen werden.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowMountMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You have unlocked the ability to summon this mount. Uses the action channel (not System filtering).

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayerLevelUpMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Dies zeigt nur die Nachricht die auftritt, wenn ein andere Spieler eine Stufe aufsteigt. z. B. Spieler erreicht Level 33!

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayersEarnedAchievementMessages
data.value: Show other player's earned achievement messages

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayersEarnedAchievementMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Player earns the achievement <name>! Uses the Progress channel.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayersLevelUpMessages
data.value: Show other player's level up messages

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowPVPExpGainMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z. B. Du erhältst 500 PvP Routine.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowQuestProgressMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. "Starting from Scrap" accepted. / "Starting from Scrap" complete! / "Starting from Scrap" objective fulfilled!

data.name: ReplacesSpecialCharactersSuchAsWithA
data.value: Replaces block-letter and special UI font characters with normal letters (A–Z, 0–9) in chat text.

data.name: Shared_RequiresSystemFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter System channel on the General tab. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: SystemTab_ServerAnnouncementMode_LoginThenCondensed
data.value: Voll bei Anmeldung, gekürzt bei Weltwechsel

data.name: SystemTab_ServerAnnouncementsHelpMarker
data.value:
How to handle the server message block shown on login or world travel (welcome headers, in-game event promos, congestion notices, phishing warning).
Show all — unchanged. Hide all — suppress the whole block. Condensed — keep only the "Welcome to <world>!" line. Login only — full block on login, nothing on world-hops. Login full, condensed on world-hop — full block on login, only the welcome line on world-hops. Hide phishing warning only — keeps greeting and event text, removes the phishing/congestion warning and its URL.
Uses localized matching for all supported client languages (EN/DE/FR/JP).

data.name: SystemTab_ShowActiveHelpEntryMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Active Help entry added. Tutorial pop-ups for new content and UI features.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowAetherCompassMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Der Kompass erkennt eine Windätherquelle ungefähr 143 Yalms im Westen...

data.name: SystemTab_ShowAetheryteTicketMessageHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You used an aetheryte ticket. (Remaining: 5). Often appears on the System line in chat even though LogMessage 535 is Item-type.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicBookStepMessages
data.value: Show ARR Relic book step completed messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicBookStepMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. All objectives under the category Dungeons for <Relic Weapon> - Strength +2 complete!

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicProgressMessages
data.value: Show ARR Relic book step progress messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicProgressMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Record of Ouranos kill (1/1) added for <Relic Weapon> - Strength +2.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowEverythingElseHelpMarker
data.value: Catch-all for System channel messages not covered by another option. When System filtering is enabled, checking this shows any remaining system messages TidyChat would otherwise block.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowFateDiscoveryMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. The FATE <name> has appeared in the <location> area!

data.name: SystemTab_ShowFateLevelSyncMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You are 6 or more levels above the recommended level for this FATE. Checked = hide this message.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowFriendListMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Player has sent you a friend request. / Player is now on your friend list. / Friend list updated.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowHiddenMessagesDropdownHeader
data.value: Systemnachrichten anzeigen, die Tidy Chat standardmäßig ausblendet

data.name: SystemTab_ShowInstanceMessageHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You are now in the instanced area Old Sharlayan ❷. Current instance can be confirmed at any time using the /instance text command.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowItemSearchResultsMessageHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. 1 Gegenstand in der 4. Registerkarte deines Inventars gefunden.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowJobChangeMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You change to Scholar., Paladin registered.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowMailAttachmentMessages
data.value: Show items attached to sent mail

data.name: SystemTab_ShowMailAttachmentMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du hängst 2 Töpfe Dalamud roten Farbstoff an den Brief an.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowNumberOfCoffers
data.value: Show number of available coffers messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowOnlineStatusMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Online-Status zu Away from Keyboard gewechselt.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowOrchestrionPlayingHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Orchestrion now plays <song>. Checked = hide this message.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowPersonalMessageBookMessages
data.value: Show personal message book new entry messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowPersonalMessageBookMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. A new entry has been added to your message book. Uses the message-book channel.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowPortraitMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Portrait set as instant portrait., Portrait has expired.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowReceivedCommendationsHelpMarker
data.value: zB. Du hast ein Spieler-Lob erhalten!

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSanctuaryMessageHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You have entered a sanctuary. / You have left the sanctuary.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSayReminder
data.value: Show reminders of what to /say in chat during quests

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSayReminderHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Mit dem Chat-Modus in Sagen, geben Sie am Zielpunkt eine Phrase ein, die „Tataru“ enthält.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSRankSpawnAnnouncement
data.value: Show S Rank Hunt spawn announcement

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSRankSpawnAnnouncementHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du spürst ein sehr starkes Hochwild ...

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSSRankMinionSpawnAnnouncementHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Die Lakaien einer außergewöhnlich mächtigen Mark sind auf der Jagd nach Beute... Die Lakaien einer außergewöhnlich mächtigen Mark haben sich zurückgezogen...

data.name: SystemTab_ShowTryOnGlamourMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du probierst den Gegenstand an.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowVistaMessages
data.value: Show vista arrival and stray messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowVistaMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du bist an der Vista angekommen! und Du bist zu weit von der Vista weggegangen.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowVolumeControlMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. Master Volume muted, BGM volume set to 50.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowYouSenseSomethingMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: z.B. Du spürst etwas im weit entfernten Südwesten...

data.name: WhitelistTab_ExactNameMatchWhitelistExplanation
data.value: Bitte den Namen genau so eingeben, wie dieser auch im Chat zu sehen ist - das bedeutet auch Punkte! z.B. Nachname abgekürzt: Max M. Vorname abgekürzt: M. Mustermann Initialen: M. M.

data.name: WhitelistTab_ExplanationMessage
data.value: Alle User die in der Whitelist stehen, werden so behandelt als seien sie DU mit allen Filter-Einstellungen. Tippe des Spielers Vor- und Nachnamen ein, drück <Enter> um diese der Whitelist hinzuzufügen.

data.name: WhitelistTab_ShowAllMessagesByWhitelistedPlayer
data.value: Show all messages sent by whitelisted player

data.name: WhitelistTab_ShowAllMessagesTargetingWhitelistedPlayer
data.value: Show all messages targeting a whitelisted player
